name: Rice Blast
description: Fungal disease causing diamond-shaped lesions on leaves with gray-white centers and dark borders. Can destroy entire crops.

name: Bacterial Leaf Blight
description: Water-soaked lesions that turn yellow to white as they enlarge. Causes wilting of seedlings.

name: Brown Spot
description: Brown oval spots on leaves, often with yellow halos. Causes grain discoloration.

name: Sheath Blight
description: Irregularly shaped lesions on leaf sheaths near the water line. Greenish-gray spots enlarge and turn white.

name: Leaf Smut
description: Small black angular spots on leaves. Usually minor but can reduce photosynthesis.

name: Late Blight
description: Water-soaked dark green to brown lesions on leaves. White fungal growth on leaf undersides. Can devastate crops rapidly.

name: Early Blight
description: Dark brown concentric ring lesions (target spots) on older leaves. Progresses upward.

name: Leaf Curl Virus
description: Upward curling, thickening, and yellowing of leaves. Transmitted by whiteflies.

name: Septoria Leaf Spot
description: Small circular spots with gray centers and dark borders on lower leaves.

name: Bacterial Spot
description: Small dark, water-soaked spots on leaves that become brown and papery.

name: Powdery Mildew
description: White powdery coating on leaf surfaces. Causes yellowing and premature leaf drop.

name: Anthracnose
description: Sunken, dark spots on fruits and leaves. Causes fruit rot and dieback.

name: Cercospora Leaf Spot
description: Circular brown spots with white centers on chili leaves.

name: Cotton Leaf Curl
description: Upward or downward curling of leaves, thickening of veins, enations on leaf undersides.

name: Bacterial Blight of Cotton
description: Angular water-soaked spots on leaves that turn brown-black. Black arm on stems.

name: Grey Mildew
description: Angular pale spots on upper leaf surface with grey-white fungal growth beneath.

name: Wheat Rust (Yellow)
description: Yellow-orange pustules in stripes on leaves. Highly destructive in cool weather.

name: Wheat Rust (Brown)
description: Circular brown-orange pustules scattered on leaf surface.

name: Wheat Loose Smut
description: Entire wheat head replaced by black smut spores. Seeds appear healthy but carry the pathogen.

name: Karnal Bunt
description: Partial bunting of wheat grains with fishy smell. Black powder inside infected grains.

name: Corn Northern Leaf Blight
description: Long, elliptical gray-green lesions on corn leaves.

name: Corn Common Rust
description: Cinnamon-brown pustules on both leaf surfaces.

name: Corn Gray Leaf Spot
description: Rectangular gray to brown lesions running parallel to leaf veins.

name: Downy Mildew
description: White downy growth on leaf undersides. Causes stunting and chlorosis.

name: Potato Black Scurf
description: Dark brown to black sclerotia on potato tuber surface.

name: Potato Common Scab
description: Raised, rough, corky lesions on tuber skin.

name: Fusarium Wilt
description: Yellowing and wilting of lower leaves, brown vascular discoloration when stem is cut.

name: Mosaic Virus
description: Mottled light and dark green patches on leaves, leaf distortion.

name: Target Spot
description: Concentric ring pattern lesions (target-like) on leaves.

name: Spider Mites
description: Tiny yellow or white speckling on leaves. Fine webbing on leaf undersides.

name: Yellow Leaf Curl
description: Yellowing, curling, and reduced size of leaves. Severe stunting.

name: Leaf Mold
description: Pale green to yellow spots on upper leaf surface. Olive-green to brown velvety growth below.

name: Alternaria Leaf Spot
description: Dark brown to black circular or irregular spots with concentric rings.

name: Boll Rot
description: Rotting and blackening of cotton bolls. Black spore masses visible.

name: Tikka Disease
description: Circular dark brown spots on groundnut leaves with yellow halos.

name: Stem Rot
description: White fungal growth at the base of stem. Plant wilts and dies.

name: Healthy
description: No disease detected. Plant appears healthy.

name: Unknown/Unidentified
description: Disease could not be identified with sufficient confidence. Manual expert review recommended.
